title: Disappearing Worlds
description: The entire world above and below you vanishes after 10 seconds..
body:
Minecraft but all the blocks from void to world height disappear 10 seconds after you step on that location!



Features:

- A brand new challenge where you can never step on the same place twice
- /startworldcrumbling to begin
- /stopworldcrumbling to stop
- /delayworldcrumbling to set the delay in ticks between walking on a block, and that area disappearing
- /randomdisappear to make blocks around the player disappear instead of directly below only
- /singledisappear that makes blocks disappear 1 at a time around the player
